series_metadata.series_title: Request for Stop, Release or Cancellation of Warrant
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of requests to have open warrants stopped, cancelled or released.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, move to agency archives retain 1 year, when no longer of agency value, then destroy., Paper: Shred
